name: bstack
description: Broomva Stack — the governance metalayer that turns an agent workspace into a self-operating system. Wires the P1–P20 automation primitives as Claude Code hooks (SessionStart knowledge-wakeup + autoupdate, Stop arc-continuation + leverage-sensor, UserPromptSubmit autonomous-posture, PreToolUse L3-stability gate) alongside the bstack CLI. Hook paths self-locate via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so the checkout stays installer-immune.
